***Shayad*** ([Urdu](/wiki/Urdu_language "Urdu language"): شاید; transl. Perhaps) is a 2017 [Pakistani](/wiki/Pakistani_dramas "Pakistani dramas") drama serial directed by [Bashar Momin](/wiki/Bashar_Momin "Bashar Momin") director [Syed Ali Raza Usama](/wiki/Syed_Ali_Raza_Usama "Syed Ali Raza Usama"), produced by [Babar Javed](/wiki/Babar_Javed "Babar Javed") and written by Faiza Iftikhar, based on her novel of same name. The drama stars [Uzair Jaswal](/wiki/Uzair_Jaswal "Uzair Jaswal"), [Sadia Khan](/wiki/Sadia_Khan "Sadia Khan") and [Noman Ijaz](/wiki/Noman_Ijaz "Noman Ijaz") in lead roles, and premiered on 4 November 2017 on [Geo Entertainment](/wiki/Geo_Entertainment "Geo Entertainment"). It was the second serial of singer turned actor [Uzair Jaswal](/wiki/Uzair_Jaswal "Uzair Jaswal") after *Moray Saiyaan*.[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)

## Synopsis

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Shayad&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Synopsis")]

There is always some madness in love. But there is also always some reason in madness. Sometime in life, an unusual situation happens, where a younger boy falls in a love of a girl who is older than him. Drama serial "*Shayad*" depicts the story of a one sided lover Saad, who has developed some feelings for Umm-e-Hani. She is an orphan girl and lives with Saad and his parents.

Umm-e-Hani has lost the shelter of parents in earlier age, and she is always in search of secure hands, a responsible man who can help in overcoming her insecurities and fulfilled her wishes which she wasn't able to convert into reality. She always considers Saad as an emotional, immature and boyish person and one day she finally meets a strong, influential and a man of her dream, Salaar.

Unfortunately not every beast is kind towards beauty, and Umm-e-Hani's sensible and long term decision takes her into a new trouble.

Will Saad's craziness and unconditional love towards Umm-e-Hani help him in finding her again in life?

## Cast

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Shayad&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Cast")]

* [Uzair Jaswal](/wiki/Uzair_Jaswal "Uzair Jaswal") as Saad
* [Sadia Khan](/wiki/Sadia_Khan "Sadia Khan") as Umm-e-Hani (Hani)
* [Noman Ijaz](/wiki/Noman_Ijaz "Noman Ijaz") as Salaar
* [Munazzah Arif](/wiki/Munazzah_Arif "Munazzah Arif") as Naila
* Mohsin Gilani as Rizwan
* [Irfan Khoosat](/wiki/Irfan_Khoosat "Irfan Khoosat") as Dada
* [Azra Aftab](/wiki/Azra_Aftab "Azra Aftab") as Saalar Mother
* Haseeb Khan as Aslam
* Hareeb Farooque as Junaid
* Sofia Ahmed as Mahparha
* Farhana Maqsood as Salma
* [Kinza Razzak](/wiki/Kinza_Razzak "Kinza Razzak") as Taniya
* Wasim Haider as Sheharyar
* Saba Shahid as Anila
* Ali Mirza as Shoaib
* Samina Butt as Khala Batool

## Soundtrack

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Shayad&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Soundtrack")]

The [original soundtrack](/wiki/Original_soundtrack "Original soundtrack") of Shayad is composed by Syed Adeel Ali while the lyrics are provided by Ayub Khawar. The vocals are by [Uzair Jaswal](/wiki/Uzair_Jaswal "Uzair Jaswal") who is also the second lead actor of this drama serial. The [song](https://patari.pk/home/song/Uzair-Jaswal-Shayad-OST)[*[dead link](/wiki/Wikipedia:Link_rot "Wikipedia:Link rot")*] is available on [Patari](/wiki/Patari_(service) "Patari (service)").
